title: phanera klugii
intro: Phanera klugii, also known as Indian tree or rattan cane, is a species of plant in the family Moraceae, native to India and Southeast Asia. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The medicinal properties of Phanera klugii include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate pain, making it a valuable remedy for several health conditions. Herbal preparations of Phanera klugii include decoctions and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, and it is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
